name: Public Joint Stock Company ROSSETI Northern Caucasus
summary: Public Joint Stock Company "ROSSETI Northern Caucasus" provides power transmission and distribution services in the Republic of Ingushetia. It also engages in the technological connection of consumers to the grid infrastructure; and buys and sells electric power and capacity in wholesale and retail markets. The company is based in Pyatigorsk, Russia. Public Joint Stock Company "ROSSETI Northern Caucasus" operates as a subsidiary of Rosseti, Public Joint Stock Company.
